relations.note: Masthead gradient is one member of the approved set with a specific logo-contrast usage.
Orientation/usage rules apply to the approved gradients.

effect.reserved_for: the approved gradient set (Brand Blue → Dark Navy; Sky Blue → Deep Blue; Sunshine → 75% Gold; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine; Sunshine → light gold masthead)
effect.subject: background gradients

quotes: | Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |

rules.intent: Restrict backgrounds to sanctioned brand gradients.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set may be used; never invent gradients. Approved gradients: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45, dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves); Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74, blue backgrounds, waves); Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%, warm backgrounds); Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9, soft light backgrounds); Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b, warm light-to-saturated backgrounds); and the masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c).

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Ensure logo contrast on the masthead via the correct gradient.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) is the gradient to use with the LISRAYA logo mark for contrast; the mark sits at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

rules.intent: Define correct gradient orientation and application contexts.
rules.rule_text: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown). They are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.
